caption: A man wearing a dark shirt is visible in a small inset video window in the upper right corner of a presentation slide. The slide is titled "OPS-5G TA4 – Principled Programmable Defenses" and lists an objective to "Change programmability from a threat vector to an enabler of security at scale." Logos for "Georgia Tech" and "Peraton" appear in the top right, while "#openenedge" and "THE LINUX FOUNDATION | LF/NETWORKING | LF EDGE" are visible at the bottom. The center of the slide features a technical diagram with icons for networking hardware and a gold starburst graphic, alongside a map showing global connectivity lines. Throughout the sequence, the man in the inset window remains in a similar position, although his facial expression and head posture shift slightly as he speaks. The main content of the slide remains static across all frames.
